fields.title: fix: make $skill autocomplete work with tau terminal prompt editor
fields.description:
Bug: skill-marker extension sets a custom editor via ctx.ui.setEditorComponent, but tau/terminal-prompt also sets a custom editor and is loaded after skill-marker, overwriting it. Result: $skill autocomplete stops working globally.

Fix approach:
- Stop skill-marker extension from owning the editor (no ctx.ui.setEditorComponent).
- Implement $skill autocomplete + auto-trigger inside tau terminal prompt editor (TerminalPromptEditor), since it owns the editor.
- Keep skill-marker extension responsible for skill injection only.

DoD:
- With global extensions installed, typing '$' shows skill suggestions even outside tau repo.
- / and @ completions remain unchanged.
- Skill injection still works.
fields.notes: Revising approach: use editor-hub plugin composition so terminal-prompt and skill-marker remain independent; do not move logic into terminal-prompt directly.
fields.close_reason: Resolved via editor-hub plugin composition; skill-marker and terminal-prompt no longer fight over editor ownership
